headline: Boeing Ramps 737 MAX Output As China Order And Defense Wins Build
summary: Boeing (NYSE:BA) is ramping up 737 MAX production following FAA approval. The company has secured a substantial new commercial aircraft order from China. Boeing also recently won several large defense and aerospace contracts. Boeing sits at the intersection of global air travel and defense, with the 737 MAX as a core product in its commercial lineup. The decision to lift output on that program, together with a sizeable China order, highlights that airlines and governments are continuing to...

headline: Susquehanna Bullish on Woodward (WWD) as Aerospace Demand Supports Long-Term Growth
summary: Woodward, Inc. (NASDAQ:WWD) is included among the Billionaire George Soros Stock Portfolio: 10 Best Stocks to Buy. On May 26, Susquehanna initiated coverage of Woodward with a Positive rating. It also set a $423 price target on the stock.
